items.title: ASC has 8 unscheduled days in next 14d
ASC: 1 scheduled slot(s) past their fire time
items.detail: Tracker says scheduled but scheduled_for is in the past. With API live, run `python scripts/reconcile_past_fire.py --niche asc` to auto-fix. First few: #61 (2026-05-18 11:00, 0.8h ago).
